pages.text: 今天是个大晴天，Sam 爸爸要带咘咘去森林里的小集市。"咘咘，出门碰见别人，第一件事做什么呀？"咘咘眨眨眼睛，不知道。
pages.text_en: It was a bright sunny day, and Daddy Sam was taking Bubu to a little market in the forest. "Bubu, when you meet someone, what’s the first thing you should do?" Bubu blinked her big eyes, unsure.

pages.text: Sam 爸爸笑着说："碰见别人，要先笑着说‘你好’！这样别人就知道你是个有礼貌的小朋友了。"
pages.text_en: Daddy Sam smiled and said: "When you meet someone, smile and say 'Hello!' That way, they’ll know you’re a polite little bunny."

pages.text: 走了一会儿，他们碰到了小刺猬豆豆。豆豆正在路边摘果子。咘咘有点害羞，躲到了 Sam 爸爸身后。
pages.text_en: After a while, they met Doudou the hedgehog. He was picking berries by the roadside. Bubu felt a little shy and hid behind Daddy Sam.

pages.text: Sam 爸爸轻轻推了推咘咘："试试看？"咘咘小声地说了一句："豆豆……你好。"
pages.text_en: Daddy Sam gently nudged Bubu. "Give it a try?" Bubu whispered softly, "Doudou...hello."

pages.text: 豆豆转过头，开心地笑了！"咘咘你好呀！你要吃果子吗？又甜又好吃！"豆豆递了一颗红红的果子给咘咘。
pages.text_en: Doudou turned and smiled warmly! "Hello, Bubu! Do you want some berries? They’re sweet and yummy!" He handed Bubu a plump red berry.

pages.text: 咘咘开心极了——原来说你好，就能交到朋友呀！她蹦蹦跳跳地继续走。
pages.text_en: Bubu was thrilled—saying hello could make friends! She hopped along happily.

pages.text: 走到小河边，咘咘看到小乌龟慢慢正在晒太阳。这次咘咘没有害羞，大声说："慢慢，你好呀！"
pages.text_en: By the river, Bubu saw Manman the turtle basking in the sun. This time, she wasn’t shy and said loudly, "Hello, Manman!"

pages.text: 慢慢慢慢地抬起头，露出一个大大的微笑："咘咘你好！今天太阳好舒服，你要一起晒吗？"
pages.text_en: Manman slowly raised her head and gave a big smile: "Hello, Bubu! The sun feels so nice today. Do you want to sit and bask with me?"

pages.text: 到了集市，好热闹啊！咘咘看到卖蜂蜜的大熊伯伯。"大熊伯伯，你好！"咘咘笑着说。
pages.text_en: The market was so lively! Bubu saw Uncle Bear selling honey. "Hello, Uncle Bear!" Bubu said with a bright smile.

pages.text: 大熊伯伯哈哈大笑："哎呀，这么有礼貌的小朋友！来，送你一小罐蜂蜜尝尝！"
pages.text_en: Uncle Bear laughed heartily: "Oh, what a polite little bunny! Here, have a small jar of honey as a treat!"

pages.text: 咘咘又看到了卖花的兔妈妈。"兔妈妈，你好！你的花好漂亮啊！"兔妈妈笑眯眯地送了咘咘一朵小雏菊。
pages.text_en: Bubu then saw Rabbit Mama selling flowers. "Hello, Rabbit Mama! Your flowers are so beautiful!" Rabbit Mama smiled and gave Bubu a little daisy.

pages.text: NOMI 也在集市上，正在帮别人修东西。咘咘跑过去："NOMI，你好呀！"NOMI 抬头笑了："咘咘今天好有礼貌呀，是不是碰见每个人都打招呼了？"
pages.text_en: NOMI was at the market too, fixing something for someone. Bubu ran over: "Hello, NOMI!" NOMI looked up and smiled: "Wow, Bubu! You’re so polite today! Did you greet everyone you met?"

pages.text: NONO 从天上飞下来："我在天上都听到咘咘的声音了！到处都在说你好你好你好！哈哈哈！"
pages.text_en: NONO flew down from the sky: "I heard Bubu’s voice from up there! Everywhere it’s hello, hello, hello! Haha!"

pages.text: 回家的路上，咘咘的小手里拿着果子、蜂蜜、小雏菊。Sam 爸爸问："今天开心吗？"咘咘用力点头："开心！因为每个人对我都好好！"Sam 爸爸说："那是因为你先对别
pages.text_en: On the way home, Bubu held berries, honey, and a daisy in her little hands. Daddy Sam asked: "Did you have fun today?" Bubu nodded enthusiastically: "Yes! Everyone was so kind to me!" Daddy Sam said: "That’s because you were kind first."

pages.text: 💡 咘咘今天学到了：碰见别人，先笑着说"你好"！一句小小的你好，就能让别人开心，也能让自己交到好朋友。你好，就是最好的开始！
pages.text_en: 💡 Bubu learned today: When you meet someone, smile and say "hello" first! A simple hello can make others happy and help you make new friends. Hello is the best first step!
